subcodes.first_line: O thou pilgrim to the Spot round which circle the Concourse on high! Unloose thy tongue and render thanks
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مطاف ملا اعلی لسان بشکرانه لطف و احسان و عنایت خاصه جمال منان بگشا
subcodes.subjects: @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @Shrines and Holy places, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
